description_long: This rifle features a classic design with a wooden fixed stock and foregrip, paired with a black metal receiver and barrel assembly. The magazine is a prominent drum type, positioned beneath the receiver, suggesting high ammunition capacity. The barrel is long and slender, with a front sight post and a simple rear sight, both in iron sight configuration. The trigger and pistol grip are ergonomically shaped, with the grip also finished in wood. The overall construction combines wood and metal, giving it a robust and utilitarian appearance. The rifle's finish is mostly matte, with some slight sheen on the metal parts, and the wood sections display a natural brown hue.
description: A robust rifle with a wooden fixed stock, drum magazine, and long black metal barrel, featuring iron sights and a matte finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, highlighting the wooden stock, drum magazine, and iron sights.
description_view_1: Front view emphasizing the circular drum magazine and the alignment of the barrel and sights.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden stock, drum magazine, and the length of the barrel.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock and the rear sight, with the drum magazine visible below.
